title: Graceful degradation can return fallback portfolio while dropping higher-level constraints
impact: Can produce an applicable portfolio that no longer respects geo/group/tactical/objective constraints.
recommendation: Populate warnings, expose lost_constraints, and require strict confirmation/blocking for constraint-dropping fallbacks.

title: Volatility band/risk budget is modeled but not enforced as a hard constraint
impact: Profiles may appear to have volatility caps while solver output can land outside the band.
recommendation: Enforce vol_band or label/report it as target-only; add achieved_vol validation.

title: Feasibility precheck misses max-attainable bucket floors under max_weight/fixed positions
impact: Impossible bucket minima can reach solver/fallback and return degraded portfolios.
recommendation: Calculate max attainable exposure per bucket before solver.

title: Missing V2 exposure can be treated as zero equity during suitability checks
impact: Incomplete exposure can pass low-risk suitability as if it had 0% equity.
recommendation: Require usable exposure or conservative class-based block for profiles 1-4.

title: Weight normalization can preserve negative output weights if upstream weights contain negatives
impact: Negative weights can leak into final allocation if upstream produces tiny/invalid negatives.
recommendation: Sanitize numerator, assert finite non-negative weights, and fail/fallback loudly on invariant break.
